name: developer-start
description: Guide a first-run developer through repository lifecycle readiness, bootstrap guidance, and the next safe action.

arguments.name: repo_root
arguments.description: Repository root. Defaults to the current workspace when omitted.

arguments.name: docs_root
arguments.description: Optional docs root. Defaults to docs.

arguments.name: project_summary
arguments.description: Optional user-confirmed project purpose for previewing blank-repo bootstrap guidance.

instructions: Call lifecycle_guide first when MCP tools are available.
If the repository is blank or near blank, use bootstrap_plan and keep the result preview-only until the user approves writes.
Do not invent architecture, pattern guidance, or agent directives for a blank repository.
Report the current repository classification, docs readiness, active spec readiness, bootstrap recommendation, tooling, and next safe actions.
client_support_recovery: If MCP tools are unavailable, run spec_runtime.py lifecycle-guide or spec_runtime.py bootstrap-plan from the repository root.
